SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?opponent ?opponentLabel WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P31 wd:Q206875 .
  {
    ?game wdt:P1446 wd:Q219714 ; wdt:P1441 ?opponent ; wdt:P1344 ?opponent .
  } UNION {
    ?game wdt:P1441 wd:Q219714 ; wdt:P1446 ?opponent ; wdt:P1344 ?opponent .
  }
  ?game wdt:P585 ?date .
  FILTER(?date >= "2023-09-01T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime && ?date <= "2024-02-15T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
  ?opponent rdfs:label ?opponentLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?opponentLabel) = 'en')
}
ORDER BY ?date
```
